consensus.en: Pre-training scaling laws continue to deliver gains as expected.
consensus.zh: 预训练的缩放定律继续如预期带来收益。

consensus.en: RL scaling shows similar log-linear improvements as pre-training.
consensus.zh: 强化学习缩放展现出与预训练类似的对数线性改进。

consensus.en: Economic diffusion of AI is fast but not instantaneous.
consensus.zh: AI的经济扩散快速但并非瞬间完成。

consensus.en: AI progress follows a soft takeoff with steep exponentials.
consensus.zh: AI进展遵循陡峭指数曲线的软起飞模式。

consensus.en: Frontier labs need safeguards like bio classifiers and alignment work.
consensus.zh: 前沿实验室需要生物分类器和对齐工作等保障措施。

consensus.en: AGI will likely be achieved within a decade, with high confidence.
consensus.zh: AGI很可能在十年内实现，信心很高。

contrarian.en: The public fails to recognize how close we are to the end of the exponential.
contrarian.zh: 公众未能认识到我们离指数增长的终点有多近。

contrarian.en: Continual learning may not be a barrier; generalization from pre-training and RL may suffice.
contrarian.zh: 持续学习可能不是障碍；预训练和强化学习的泛化可能就足够了。

contrarian.en: Profitability in AI labs comes from underestimating demand, not from underinvestment.
contrarian.zh: AI实验室的盈利来自低估需求，而非投资不足。

contrarian.en: A country of geniuses in a data center could arrive in 1-3 years, not 10.
contrarian.zh: 数据中心里的天才之国可能在1-3年内到来，而非10年。

contrarian.en: Authoritarianism may become morally obsolete in the age of powerful AI.
contrarian.zh: 在强大AI时代，威权主义可能在道德上变得过时。

contrarian.en: AI constitutions should be set through competition between companies, not government mandate.
contrarian.zh: AI宪法应通过公司间的竞争来制定，而非政府指令。
